title: Sweet & Tender Portuguese Tofu Stir-fry
description: A midnight-craving dish featuring white vinegar and tofu in a savory sauce that is both sweet and tender.

ingredients.name: pepper
ingredients.notes: Black pepper or similar spice for flavor

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add tofu to the pan and season with salt, pepper, and soy sauce. Stir-fry until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Remove tofu from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add chopped onion and garlic. Cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add carrots and bell peppers to the pan. Cook for another 3-4 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Return the tofu to the pan with the vegetables. Add white vinegar and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with cold water until smooth. Pour into the pan and stir quickly to combine all ingredients. Cook for another minute until sauce thickens.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
